title: Citizenship ceremony:  Ceremony formats - Canada.ca
content:
Citizenship ceremony
If we invite you to the ceremony, you’ll attend
- a virtual ceremony or
- an in-person ceremony
We may invite you to attend a virtual ceremony by video conference.
Check your ceremony invitation for the date, time and video conference link.
Here’s what a virtual ceremony is like:

### The virtual Canadian citizenship ceremony
No endorsement of any products or services is expressed or implied.
Current position: 00:00:00
Total time: 00:04:37
This video will help you learn what to expect on the day of the virtual ceremony.
This video is also available in high definition (HD) on YouTube . You can share it on your social media channels or embed it on your website.
We may invite you  to attend an in-person ceremony.
Check your ceremony invitation for details on date, time and location.
Here’s what an in-person ceremony looks like:

### The in-person Canadian citizenship ceremony
No endorsement of any products or services is expressed or implied.
Current position: 00:00:00
Total time: 00:04:57
This video will help you learn what you can expect on the day of the in-person ceremony.
This video is also available in HD on YouTube , where you can leave a comment or embed it on your website.

## Changing the ceremony format
You can request to reschedule your ceremony if
- we invite you to a virtual ceremony, but you want to attend one in person
- we invite you to an in-person ceremony, but you want to attend a virtual one
Find out how to reschedule the ceremony .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
